svg.title: SciModelingBench biomolecular design tasks
svg.desc: A compact scientific montage of DNA binding landscapes, Pho4-DNA binding, 5-prime UTR controlled ribosome loading, and GFP sequence-brightness ranking.
svg.metadata: Pho4-DNA structure: RCSB PDB 1A0A. GFP structure: RCSB PDB 1GFL. Ribosome translation illustration adapted from the public-domain Wikimedia Commons work "Ribosome mRNA translation en.svg" by LadyofHats. Task-specific sequence, UTR construct, and measurement overlays are original vector artwork for SciModelingBench.

g.text: DNA-binding optimization, 5′UTR-controlled ribosome loading, and GFP sequence–brightness prediction.
